subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Book, in the nights and days, summoneth all peoples to the Most Exalted Horizon and the Supreme Summit, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب اعظم در لیالی و ایام امم را بافق اعلی و زروه علیا دعوت مینماید و لکن
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
